overview.name: HTTP Variables
overview.description:
This scenario verifies HTTP request execution using variables.
Test flow includes: 1. Create variables for endpoints, entity fields and expected file names. 2. Send POST request using variables in endpoint and request body. 3. Verify response status = 201 using expected file variable. 4. Send GET request using variable-based endpoint. 5. Verify created entity is returned using expected file variable. 6. Reset in-memory storage using variable-based endpoint.
This scenario validates: - Variable injection into HTTP endpoints - Variable injection into request body - Variable injection into expected file names - Variable reuse across HTTP steps

var.comment: Create endpoint variable for entity creation
var.name: createEndpoint

var.comment: Create endpoint variable for retrieving all entities
var.name: getAllEndpoint

var.comment: Create endpoint variable for storage reset
var.name: resetEndpoint

http.comment: Step 1-3. Create entity using variables in endpoint and body
Step 6. Reset entity storage using variable-based endpoint
